channel.description: Recent content in P5js on allokkio

item.title: Sketch: Doodle Flower
item.description:
Code:

var c_size = 450
var midpoint = 0.5*c_size;
var c_pad = c_size - 20
var alpha_decay = 20
var easing = 0.03;
var x = midpoint
var y = midpoint

var red = 30
var green = 144
var blue = 255

var update_time = 0
var update_step = 100

function setup() {
  background("#DDDCD3");
  var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');

}

function mousePressed() {
  red = 30
  green = 144
  blue = 255
}

function draw() {

  if (frameCount > update_time) {
    update_time += update_step
    red = round( random(1,244) )
    green = round( random(1,244) )
    blue = round( random(1,244) )
  }

  //square
  stroke("#DDDCD3")
  fill("#DDDCD3")
  rect(0,0,c_size-1,c_size-1);
  // outer circles
  fill("#EEEDE4");
  stroke("#EEEDE4")
  ellipse(0,0,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(0,c_size,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(c_size,0,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(c_size,c_size,c_size,c_size);
  // line
  stroke(red, green, blue);
  line(midpoint, midpoint, x, y)
  // cicrles 1
  fill(red, green, blue);
  stroke(red, green, blue);
    ellipse(midpoint,
            midpoint,
            c_pad/6,
            c_pad/6);
    ellipse(x, y, 25, 25);
    ellipse(0.5*(midpoint+x),
            0.5*(midpoint+y),
            c_pad/8,
            c_pad/8);
  fill(221, 220, 211, 0);
  strokeWeight(3);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255-alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.65*midpoint + 0.35*x,
            0.65*midpoint + 0.35*y,
            c_pad/4,
            c_pad/4);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 2*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.8*midpoint + 0.2*x,
            0.8*midpoint + 0.2*y,
            c_pad/3,
            c_pad/3);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 4*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.9*midpoint + 0.1*x,
            0.9*midpoint + 0.1*y,
            c_pad/2,
            c_pad/2);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 6*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.95*midpoint + 0.05*x,
            0.95*midpoint + 0.05*y,
            c_pad,
            c_pad);
  // ellipses 1
  strokeWeight(1);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/3, c_pad/4);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/4, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/2, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/3, c_pad/2);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad  , c_pad/2);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/2, c_pad  );
  // cicles 2
  strokeWeight(2);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 8*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0, midpoint, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(c_size, midpoint, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(midpoint, 0, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(midpoint, c_size, c_size, c_size);
  // update position
  x += (mouseX - x) * easing;
  y += (mouseY - y) * easing;

}

item.title: Sketch: Doodle Flower
item.description:
Code:

var c_size = 450
var midpoint = 0.5*c_size;
var c_pad = c_size - 20
var alpha_decay = 20
var easing = 0.03;
var x = midpoint
var y = midpoint

var red = 30
var green = 144
var blue = 255

var update_time = 0
var update_step = 100

function setup() {
  background("#DDDCD3");
  var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');

}

function mousePressed() {
  red = 30
  green = 144
  blue = 255
}

function draw() {

  if (frameCount > update_time) {
    update_time += update_step
    red = round( random(1,244) )
    green = round( random(1,244) )
    blue = round( random(1,244) )
  }

  //square
  stroke("#DDDCD3")
  fill("#DDDCD3")
  rect(0,0,c_size-1,c_size-1);
  // outer circles
  fill("#EEEDE4");
  stroke("#EEEDE4")
  ellipse(0,0,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(0,c_size,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(c_size,0,c_size,c_size);
  ellipse(c_size,c_size,c_size,c_size);
  // line
  stroke(red, green, blue);
  line(midpoint, midpoint, x, y)
  // cicrles 1
  fill(red, green, blue);
  stroke(red, green, blue);
    ellipse(midpoint,
            midpoint,
            c_pad/6,
            c_pad/6);
    ellipse(x, y, 25, 25);
    ellipse(0.5*(midpoint+x),
            0.5*(midpoint+y),
            c_pad/8,
            c_pad/8);
  fill(221, 220, 211, 0);
  strokeWeight(3);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255-alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.65*midpoint + 0.35*x,
            0.65*midpoint + 0.35*y,
            c_pad/4,
            c_pad/4);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 2*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.8*midpoint + 0.2*x,
            0.8*midpoint + 0.2*y,
            c_pad/3,
            c_pad/3);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 4*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.9*midpoint + 0.1*x,
            0.9*midpoint + 0.1*y,
            c_pad/2,
            c_pad/2);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 6*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0.95*midpoint + 0.05*x,
            0.95*midpoint + 0.05*y,
            c_pad,
            c_pad);
  // ellipses 1
  strokeWeight(1);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/3, c_pad/4);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/4, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/2, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/3, c_pad/2);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad  , c_pad/2);
    ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/2, c_pad  );
  // cicles 2
  strokeWeight(2);
  stroke(red, green, blue, 255 - 8*alpha_decay);
    ellipse(0, midpoint, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(c_size, midpoint, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(midpoint, 0, c_size, c_size);
    ellipse(midpoint, c_size, c_size, c_size);
  // update position
  x += (mouseX - x) * easing;
  y += (mouseY - y) * easing;

}

item.title: Sketch: Flares
item.description:
Code:

var canvas_size = 450;
var canvas_pad = 50;
var radius = (canvas_size-canvas_pad)/2;
var midpoint = canvas_size/2;
var ball_radius = 150;
// Blob def
function Blob(x,y) {
  this.pos = createVector(x,y)
  this.vel = p5.Vector.random2D();
  this.vel.mult(10,20)
  this.r = ball_radius
  //
  this.update= function() {
    this.pos.add(this.vel)

    var pos_out = (midpoint-this.pos.x)**2 + (midpoint-this.pos.y)**2 >= (radius-0.3*ball_radius)**2

    if (pos_out) {
      this.vel.x *= -1
      this.vel.y *= -1
    }
  }

}

// script for running metaballs
var b=[]

function setup() {

  //b = new Blob(100,100)
  var canvas = createCanvas(canvas_size, canvas_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');
  for (var i=1; i<=2; i++) {
    b.push(new Blob(midpoint,midpoint))
  }
}

function draw() {
  background("#000000");
  for (var i = 0; i<b.length; i++) {
     noiseSeed(i);
     b[i].vel.x += 0.05*noise(1);
     noiseSeed(i);
     b[i].vel.y += 0.05*noise(1);
   }

  loadPixels();
  for (var y=0; y<height; y++) {
    for (var x=0; x<width; x++) {
      var index=(x+y*width)*4;
      var sum = 0;

      for (var i = 0; i<b.length; i++) {
        var d = dist(x,y,b[i].pos.x,b[i].pos.y);
        sum += ball_radius * b[i].r/d;
       }
      //
    var pos_out = (midpoint-x)**2 + (midpoint-y)**2 >= (radius)**2;
      if (pos_out) {
        pixels[index] = 238;
        pixels[index+1] = 237;
        pixels[index+2] = 228;
      } else {
        pixels[index] = min(30 + 0.17*sum, 238);
        pixels[index+1] = min(144 + 0.15*sum, 237);
        pixels[index+2] = min(255 + 0.12*sum, 228);
      }
   }
  }
  updatePixels()
  for(var i=0; i<b.length; i++){
    b[i].update();
  }
  fill(211,220,211,0);
  stroke(221,220,211);
  strokeWeight(3);
  ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, 2*radius, 2*radius);
}

item.title: Sketch: Flares
item.description:
Code:

var canvas_size = 450;
var canvas_pad = 50;
var radius = (canvas_size-canvas_pad)/2;
var midpoint = canvas_size/2;
var ball_radius = 150;
// Blob def
function Blob(x,y) {
  this.pos = createVector(x,y)
  this.vel = p5.Vector.random2D();
  this.vel.mult(10,20)
  this.r = ball_radius
  //
  this.update= function() {
    this.pos.add(this.vel)

    var pos_out = (midpoint-this.pos.x)**2 + (midpoint-this.pos.y)**2 >= (radius-0.3*ball_radius)**2

    if (pos_out) {
      this.vel.x *= -1
      this.vel.y *= -1
    }
  }

}

// script for running metaballs
var b=[]

function setup() {

  //b = new Blob(100,100)
  var canvas = createCanvas(canvas_size, canvas_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');
  for (var i=1; i<=2; i++) {
    b.push(new Blob(midpoint,midpoint))
  }
}

function draw() {
  background("#000000");
  for (var i = 0; i<b.length; i++) {
     noiseSeed(i);
     b[i].vel.x += 0.05*noise(1);
     noiseSeed(i);
     b[i].vel.y += 0.05*noise(1);
   }

  loadPixels();
  for (var y=0; y<height; y++) {
    for (var x=0; x<width; x++) {
      var index=(x+y*width)*4;
      var sum = 0;

      for (var i = 0; i<b.length; i++) {
        var d = dist(x,y,b[i].pos.x,b[i].pos.y);
        sum += ball_radius * b[i].r/d;
       }
      //
    var pos_out = (midpoint-x)**2 + (midpoint-y)**2 >= (radius)**2;
      if (pos_out) {
        pixels[index] = 238;
        pixels[index+1] = 237;
        pixels[index+2] = 228;
      } else {
        pixels[index] = min(30 + 0.17*sum, 238);
        pixels[index+1] = min(144 + 0.15*sum, 237);
        pixels[index+2] = min(255 + 0.12*sum, 228);
      }
   }
  }
  updatePixels()
  for(var i=0; i<b.length; i++){
    b[i].update();
  }
  fill(211,220,211,0);
  stroke(221,220,211);
  strokeWeight(3);
  ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, 2*radius, 2*radius);
}

item.title: Sketch: Gaussian Star
item.description:
Another little Javascript-animation based on Gaussian ellipses.

Code:

var c_size = 450
var half_c_size = 0.5*c_size;
var c_pad = c_size - 20
var time = 0.0
var increment = 0.002;
var time_to_update = time + 2*increment;
var increment_to_update = 0.03;
var n = 0
var m = 0

function setup() {
  background("#DDDCD3");
  var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');

  // info:
  textSize(19);
  stroke(221,220,211);
  fill(221,220,211);
  ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/4, c_pad/4);
  //
  fill("#EEEDE4");
  text("    ~68%  \n of the radii", c_pad/2-40, c_size/2);
  // decoration:
  // outer circles
    fill(221,220,211,0);
    stroke(221,220,211);
    strokeWeight(3);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad/2);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad, c_pad);
    // outer ellipses
    strokeWeight(1);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/4);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/4, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad/3);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/2);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad  , c_pad/2);
    ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad  );
}

function draw() {
translate(width/2, height/2);
rotate(frameCount / 50.0);
  noStroke();
  time += increment;
  if (time >= time_to_update) {
    n = abs(randomGaussian(1,c_pad/4));
    m = abs(randomGaussian(1,c_pad/4));
    time_to_update += increment_to_update

    fill(30, 144, 255, 20);
    ellipse(0, 0, n, m);
  }
}

item.title: Sketch: A little Animation-Test
item.description:
My first try at p5js. A little animation that plots a circle, with a radius determined by Guassian noise.

Code:

// variable definitions:
var c_size = 450
var c_pad = c_size - 20
var time = 0.0;
var increment = 0.001;
var time_to_update = time + 2*increment;
var increment_to_update = 0.01;
var n = 0

// canvas setup:
function setup() {
  background("#DDDCD3");
  var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size);
  canvas.parent('sketch-holder');
}

// generation and drawing:
function draw() {
  noStroke();
  time += increment;
  if (time >= time_to_update) {
    n = abs(randomGaussian(1,c_pad/2));
    time_to_update += increment_to_update

    fill(30, 144, 255, 10);
    ellipse(c_size/2, c_size/2, n, n);
  }
  stroke("#ffa500")
  strokeWeight(1)
  fill(221,220,211,0);
  ellipse(c_size/2, c_size/2, c_pad/2, c_pad/2);
  ellipse(c_size/2, c_size/2 ,c_pad, c_pad);

  // text
  textSize(19);
  noStroke( );
  fill("#ffa500");
  text("~68% of \n  samples", c_pad/4 + 18, c_size/2);
  text("~95% of \n  samples", 18, c_size/2);
}
